message:
fix(vdbe): add public emit_scan_filter for partial index WHERE clause evaluation (#27)

Expose a public wrapper around the private emit_expr + ScanCtx machinery
so that fsqlite-core can emit VDBE bytecode to evaluate partial index
WHERE predicates during CREATE INDEX backfill. Without this, the
backfill_index function had no way to filter rows that don't match the
partial index condition.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
